headline: Amazon.com, Inc. (AMZN) Expands Partnership with NiSource
summary: Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ:AMZN) is one of the 10 Best Data Center Stocks To Buy For the Long Term. The stock grew by 46.38% from last year, while it posted 11.56% growth year-to-date. The company continues to enter and expand existing partnerships, such as its agreement with utility company NiSource. On April 16, NiSource announced that […]
